ChangeRequest.name: data attribute in EIL TYP_PRTCTN_VL
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview In AnaCredit reporting table Protection received there is the attribute "type of protection value" that we need to add in the EIL, the suggested cube is INSTRMNT_CLLTRL_RCVD_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT_EIL
### Contact person @Silvia.Giacinti
### Description of change request Add a Attribute "type of protection value" in cube INSTRMNT_CLLTRL_RCVD_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT_EIL the value should be derived as following: "TYP_PRTCTN_VL=TYP_PRTCTN_VL_1 IF (BIRD_CLLTRL_EIL.FV is not NULL OR TYP_CLLTRL in (TYP_PRTCTN_13, TYP_PRTCTN_12, (TYP_PRTCTN_89, TYP_PRTCTN_86, TYP_PRTCTN_85, TYP_PRTCTN_88, TYP_PRTCTN_84, TYP_PRTCTN_81, TYP_PRTCTN_83), (TYP_PRTCTN_111, TYP_PRTCTN_110)) OR TYP_INSTRMNT_RL = ABSTRCT_INSTRMNT_RL_TYP_39 AND TYP_INSTRMNT = TYP_INSTRMNT_2 )
Fair value: When collateral type is Gold, Equity and investment fund shares or units, Other physical collateral or Other protection
(Classifications by instrument Found in Table 114 in Manual part II)" "TYP_PRTCTN_VL=TYP_PRTCTN_VL_2 IF (BIRD_CLLTRL_EIL.LT_SSTNBL_VL is not NULL OR TYP_CLLTRL IN (TYP_PRTCTN_8, TYP_PRTCTN_106, TYP_PRTCTN_107, TYP_PRTCTN_108, TYP_PRTCTN_10) )
When type of collateral is Residential real estate collateral, Offices and commercial premises, Commercial real estate collateral " "TYP_PRTCTN_VL=TYP_PRTCTN_VL_3 IF (BIRD_CLLTRL_EIL.LT_SSTNBL_VL is not NULL OR TYP_CLLTRL IN (TYP_PRTCTN_8, TYP_PRTCTN_106, TYP_PRTCTN_107, TYP_PRTCTN_108, TYP_PRTCTN_10) )
When type of collateral is Residential real estate collateral, Offices and commercial premises, Commercial real estate collateral " "TYP_PRTCTN_VL=TYP_PRTCTN_VL_4 IF (BIRD_CLLTRL_EIL.NTNL_AMNT is not NULL OR TYP_INSTRMNT in (TYP_INSTRMNT_12, TYP_INSTRMNT_511, TYP_INSTRMNT_512, TYP_INSTRMNT_522, TYP_INSTRMNT_51, TYP_INSTRMNT_80, TYP_INSTRMNT_1022, TYP_INSTRMNT_5, TYP_INSTRMNT_6, TYP_INSTRMNT_7, TYP_INSTRMNT_8, TYP_INSTRMNT_9, TYP_INSTRMNT_10, TYP_INSTRMNT_380, TYP_INSTRMNT_13, TYP_INSTRMNT_14) OR TYP_CLLTRL IN (TYP_PRTCTN_2, TYP_PRTCTN_66, TYP_PRTCTN_72, TYP_PRTCTN_12, TYP_PRTCTN_77, TYP_PRTCTN_17) )
In case the type of protection is Currency, Securitites, Trade receivables, Life insurance policies pledged, Other protection or when we take instruments : deposit, a loan, credit derivative, Financial guarantees other than credit derivatives, other protection, we take notional amount of the instrument."
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes _INSTRMNT_CLLTRL_RCVD_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT_EIL_
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
